1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get counties (fylke) table for spatial join to find county for the municipality

3.description: find the county (fylke) containing Kristiansand municipality by intersecting kommune and fylke

5.description: reduce 200-year storm-surge polygons to Kristiansand extent by intersecting with municipality geometry

6.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality (filtered by kommunenummer)

7.description: find nearest 200-year storm polygon for each building

8.description: keep only buildings within 50 metres of a 200-year storm polygon (distance_m <= 50)

9.description: attach county (fylkesnavn) to each building by joining on kommunenummer

10.description: one row per building with minimum distance, then sort and limit to 10 closest buildings

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [fylker]
SELECT objid, fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, omrade
FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, datauttaksdato, malemetode, opphav, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE omrade && (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand');

2.sql:
SELECT objid, fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, omrade
FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke;

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in Kristiansand filtered by kommunenummer from step 1

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) for later spatial reduction

4.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to Kristiansand municipality extent (intersects)

5.description: compute distances between buildings and reduced storm-surge polygons

7.description: min distance per building (one row per building) including building attributes

8.description: get county polygons to identify which county contains Kristiansand

9.description: find county containing the municipality (attach county info to municipality)

10.description: attach county info to the aggregated building distances (join on kommunenummer), then sort and limit in final result handling

args.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt, bygningid
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' AND representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, lokalid, navnerom, oppdateringsdato, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna sf
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k
  WHERE k.kommunenummer = '4204' AND ST_Intersects(k.omrade, sf.omrade)
);

1.description: get buildings in Kristiansand (kommunenummer 4204) with geometry

3.description: get county polygons and names for assigning county to buildings

4.description: compute distances between buildings and 200-year storm-surge polygons

5.description: keep only pairs within 50 metres (distance <= 50 m)

6.description: reduce to one row per building with minimum distance and keep building attributes

7.description: assign county to buildings by intersecting building points with fylke polygons

8.description: attach county name to aggregated building-distance rows using building id
